Flow

Step 1 of 1
Free mode

Use Coordinator screen controls or screen buttons to move through the prototype. The shell controls stay fixed.

App screen states

/* v1.9.6 reduced COO map: persistent right rail + simplified route markers */ #stageContent .coo-canvas{display:grid!important;grid-template-columns:340px minmax(0,1fr) 280px!important;width:100%!important;overflow:hidden!important;} #stageContent .coo-canvas>.left-rail{grid-column:1;width:340px!important;min-width:340px!important;} #stageContent .coo-canvas>.workspace{grid-column:2;min-width:0!important;width:auto!important;overflow:hidden!important;z-index:1;} #stageContent .coo-canvas>.right-rail{grid-column:3;width:280px!important;min-width:280px!important;display:flex!important;flex-direction:column!important;position:relative!important;z-index:20!important;background:#f5f5f5!important;border-left:1px solid var(--line)!important;} #stageContent .map-workspace{overflow:hidden!important;} #stageContent .sector-map.coo-sector-basemap{overflow:hidden!important;background-size:cover!important;background-position:center center!important;} #stageContent .coo-sector-basemap .subsector-divider{top:24%!important;height:54%!important;border-left:2px solid #222!important;z-index:8!important;pointer-events:auto!important;cursor:pointer!important;opacity:.95!important;} #stageContent .coo-sector-basemap .subsector-divider.critical{border-left-width:3px!important;} #stageContent .coo-sector-basemap .subsector-divider .sd-label{top:100%!important;margin-top:8px!important;background:#fff!important;color:#222!important;border:1px solid #222!important;font-size:9px!important;padding:2px 6px!important;} #stageContent .coo-sector-basemap .subsector-divider.critical .sd-label{background:#222!important;color:#fff!important;} #stageContent .coo-sector-basemap .coo-route-marker{position:absolute!important;width:0!important;height:0!important;min-width:0!important;min-height:0!important;border:0!important;background:transparent!important;padding:0!important;transform:translate(-50%,-50%)!important;z-index:14!important;cursor:pointer!important;color:#222!important;} #stageContent .coo-sector-basemap .coo-route-marker:before{display:none!important;content:none!important;} #stageContent .coo-route-marker .anchor{position:absolute!important;left:0!important;top:0!important;transform:translate(-50%,-50%)!important;width:13px!important;height:13px!important;border:2px solid #222!important;background:#fff!important;border-radius:50%!important;z-index:2!important;font-size:0!important;} #stageContent .coo-route-marker.urgent .anchor,#stageContent .coo-route-marker .anchor.filled{background:#222!important;} #stageContent .coo-route-marker .label{position:absolute!important;left:0!important;transform:translateX(-50%)!important;background:#fff!important;border:1px solid #222!important;padding:2px 5px!important;font-family:"Courier New",Courier,monospace!important;font-size:9px!important;font-weight:700!important;white-space:nowrap!important;line-height:1!important;} #stageContent .coo-route-marker.label-above .label{bottom:13px!important;} #stageContent .coo-route-marker.label-below .label{top:13px!important;} #stageContent .coo-route-marker.urgent .label{background:#222!important;color:#fff!important;} #stageContent .coo-route-marker:hover .anchor,#stageContent .coo-route-marker.is-selected .anchor{outline:2px solid #222!important;outline-offset:2px!important;} #stageContent .coo-sector-basemap .coo-cloud-marker{position:absolute!important;transform:translate(-50%,-50%)!important;background:#222!important;color:#fff!important;border:1px solid #222!important;z-index:13!important;height:22px!important;padding:0 8px!important;display:flex!important;align-items:center!important;justify-content:center!important;font-size:9px!important;font-family:"Courier New",Courier,monospace!important;font-weight:700!important;white-space:nowrap!important;cursor:pointer!important;} #stageContent .coo-sector-basemap .map-legend{left:18px!important;bottom:38px!important;z-index:11!important;} /* v1.9.7 Coordinator map design cleanup: lighter subsector lines, route-anchored callouts, uncluttered Race Cloud marker */ #stageContent .coo-sector-basemap.clean-route-map .subsector-divider{ top:25%!important; height:54%!important; border-left:1.5px solid rgba(34,34,34,.78)!important; opacity:.9!important; z-index:6!important; } #stageContent .coo-sector-basemap.clean-route-map .subsector-divider.critical{border-left-width:2px!important;} #stageContent .coo-sector-basemap.clean-route-map .subsector-divider .sd-label{ top:100%!important; margin-top:8px!important; padding:2px 6px!important; font-size:9px!important; border:1px solid #222!important; background:#fff!important; } #stageContent .coo-sector-basemap.clean-route-map .coo-route-marker{ z-index:18!important; } #stageContent .coo-sector-basemap.clean-route-map .coo-route-marker .anchor{ width:11px!important; height:11px!important; border-width:1.5px!important; z-index:3!important; } #stageContent .coo-sector-basemap.clean-route-map .coo-route-marker .leader{ position:absolute!important; left:0!important; top:0!important; width:var(--lw,44px)!important; height:0!important; border-top:1px solid rgba(34,34,34,.82)!important; transform-origin:left center!important; transform:rotate(var(--rot,0deg))!important; z-index:1!important; pointer-events:none!important; } #stageContent .coo-sector-basemap.clean-route-map .coo-route-marker .label{ left:var(--lx,0)!important; top:var(--ly,18px)!important; bottom:auto!important; transform:none!important; padding:3px 7px!important; font-size:9px!important; line-height:1!important; background:rgba(255,255,255,.96)!important; border:1px solid #222!important; z-index:2!important; max-width:190px!important; overflow:hidden!important; text-overflow:ellipsis!important; } #stageContent .coo-sector-basemap.clean-route-map .coo-route-marker.urgent .label{ background:#222!important; color:#fff!important; } #stageContent .coo-sector-basemap.clean-route-map .coo-cloud-marker.clean-cloud{ width:0!important; height:0!important; min-width:0!important; min-height:0!important; background:transparent!important; border:0!important; padding:0!important; overflow:visible!important; z-index:16!important; } #stageContent .coo-sector-basemap.clean-route-map .clean-cloud .cloud-dot{ position:absolute!important; left:0!important; top:0!important; transform:translate(-50%,-50%)!important; width:13px!important; height:13px!important; border:2px solid #222!important; border-radius:50%!important; background:#222!important; } #stageContent .coo-sector-basemap.clean-route-map .clean-cloud .cloud-label{ position:absolute!important; left:18px!important; top:12px!important; background:#222!important; color:#fff!important; border:1px solid #222!important; padding:4px 8px!important; font-family:"Courier New",Courier,monospace!important; font-size:9px!important; font-weight:700!important; white-space:nowrap!important; line-height:1!important; } #stageContent .coo-sector-basemap.clean-route-map .map-legend{opacity:.82!important;} #stageContent .coo-sector-basemap.clean-route-map .sub-band{height:20px!important;font-size:9px!important;} /* v1.9.13 route-anchored vertical map indicators: no horizontal connectors */ #stageContent .product-frame.coo-map-screen .coo-canvas{ display:grid!important; grid-template-columns:340px minmax(0,1fr) 280px!important; } #stageContent .product-frame.coo-map-screen .right-rail{ display:flex!important; width:280px!important; min-width:280px!important; position:relative!important; z-index:30!important; } #stageContent .coo-sector-basemap .subsector-divider{ top:25%!important; height:53%!important; border-left:1.5px solid rgba(34,34,34,.72)!important; opacity:.88!important; z-index:8!important; } #stageContent .coo-sector-basemap .subsector-divider.critical{ border-left-width:2.5px!important; opacity:.95!important; } #stageContent .coo-sector-basemap .coo-route-marker.route-vline, #stageContent .coo-sector-basemap .coo-route-marker.simple-vline, #stageContent .coo-sector-basemap .coo-route-marker{ position:absolute!important; width:0!important; height:0!important; min-width:0!important; min-height:0!important; padding:0!important; border:0!important; background:transparent!important; transform:translate(-50%,-50%)!important; z-index:18!important; overflow:visible!important; } #stageContent .coo-sector-basemap .coo-route-marker.route-vline:before{content:none!important;display:none!important;} #stageContent .coo-sector-basemap .coo-route-marker.route-vline .anchor{ position:absolute!important; left:0!important; top:0!important; transform:translate(-50%,-50%)!important; width:12px!important; height:12px!important; border:2px solid #222!important; border-radius:50%!important; background:#fff!important; z-index:3!important; } #stageContent .coo-sector-basemap .coo-route-marker.route-vline .anchor.filled, #stageContent .coo-sector-basemap .coo-route-marker.route-vline.urgent .anchor, #stageContent .coo-sector-basemap .coo-route-marker.route-vline.cloud-marker .anchor{ background:#222!important; } #stageContent .coo-sector-basemap .coo-route-marker.route-vline .leader{ position:absolute!important; left:0!important; width:0!important; height:var(--lead,54px)!important; border-left:1px solid rgba(34,34,34,.82)!important; border-top:0!important; background:transparent!important; transform:none!important; z-index:1!important; pointer-events:none!important; } #stageContent .coo-sector-basemap .coo-route-marker.route-vline.label-top .leader{ bottom:7px!important; top:auto!important; } #stageContent .coo-sector-basemap .coo-route-marker.route-vline.label-bottom .leader{ top:7px!important; bottom:auto!important; } #stageContent .coo-sector-basemap .coo-route-marker.route-vline .label{ position:absolute!important; left:0!important; top:auto!important; bottom:auto!important; transform:translateX(-50%)!important; background:rgba(255,255,255,.98)!important; border:1px solid #222!important; color:#222!important; padding:3px 7px!important; font-family:"Courier New",Courier,monospace!important; font-size:9px!important; line-height:1!important; font-weight:700!important; white-space:nowrap!important; z-index:2!important; } #stageContent .coo-sector-basemap .coo-route-marker.route-vline.label-top .label{ bottom:calc(var(--lead,54px) + 10px)!important; } #stageContent .coo-sector-basemap .coo-route-marker.route-vline.label-bottom .label{ top:calc(var(--lead,54px) + 10px)!important; } #stageContent .coo-sector-basemap .coo-route-marker.route-vline.urgent .label, #stageContent .coo-sector-basemap .coo-route-marker.route-vline.cloud-marker .label{ background:#222!important; color:#fff!important; } #stageContent .coo-sector-basemap .coo-route-marker.route-vline:hover .anchor, #stageContent .coo-sector-basemap .coo-route-marker.route-vline.is-selected .anchor{ outline:2px solid #222!important; outline-offset:2px!important; }
